text: Melado by Guluna is a premium ice cream shop in University Town, Peshawar, Pakistan. It serves dairy ice cream, milkshakes, cones, and pure-fruit popsicles.
Melado by Guluna's address is B1, Old Jamrud Road, near Bitani Plaza, University Town, Peshawar. A useful landmark is that it is near Chief Grill.
Melado by Guluna is open every day from 12:00 PM (noon) until 1:00 AM. It is a late-night ice cream spot.
Melado by Guluna is part of the Melado brand, which is a brand of Prime Industries. Melado makes premium dairy ice cream and artisanal pure-fruit popsicles from natural ingredients.
The brand story: a father turned his little daughter Guluna's wish for ice cream into a whole ice cream brand. The brand is associated with Asim Kamal and Guluna Kamal.

Melado has around 19 unique ice cream flavours in total. Some of the known ice cream flavours are Mango, Saffron (Zafran), and Chocolate. The full current list changes and is shown on the in-store menu board; DM @meladobyguluna to ask what's available today.

Mango is a popular Melado ice cream flavour, sometimes called 'Mango mania'. It is dense, creamy and seasonal, so it can sell out fast. The Saffron (Zafran) ice cream is rich and natural, and the Chocolate is a full, creamy rich-chocolate flavour.

Melado's pure-fruit popsicle flavours include Mango, Jamun, Imli (tamarind), and Raw Mango (Kach Ambi). They are made from real fruit with no shortcuts and no fake colour. They were the first thing Guluna ever asked for. Popsicles can sell out (for example Imli sometimes goes out of stock).
Melado also makes cones, such as the Lotus and Caramel cone, plus milkshakes and ice cream in tubs.
Pricing at Melado: many items are around PKR 150 each. For the full and current price list, it is best to ask in-store or DM on Instagram.

To order from Melado by Guluna, or to ask about delivery or anything else, send a DM on Instagram to @meladobyguluna. There is no public phone number listed online, so Instagram DM is the best way to reach us. The shop has roughly 58,000 followers on Instagram.
A new Melado by Guluna branch is opening in Mingora, Swat on 20 June, from 2 PM onwards. There will be a meet and greet with Asim Kamal, and special treats for the first guests.
Melado's social media: the Peshawar shop is on Instagram as @meladobyguluna, the parent brand is on Instagram as @themelado, and the Melado website is meladopk.com.
Melado ice cream is marketed as premium, handcrafted fresh daily, and made from natural ingredients.
Guluna is the cheerful young girl who is the mascot and the face of the brand. The shop has a playful pink interior in University Town, Peshawar.
Melado is expanding across Pakistan; alongside Peshawar, the brand has been launching in other cities, with Mingora (Swat) being the newest branch.
Melado serves ice cream in tubs and cones, plus milkshakes and pure-fruit popsicles. Guluna's favourites are the popsicles and the mango ice cream.
Best way to reach Melado by Guluna for orders, timings or questions is an Instagram DM to @meladobyguluna. A public phone number is not listed online.
Melado by Guluna is a great late-night dessert spot in Peshawar because the kitchen stays open until 1 AM every day.
